mapper.select: SELECT P.*, D1.DNAME AS DNAME2, D2.DNAME AS DNAME3 FROM PROFESSOR P INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D1 ON P.DEPTNO = D1.DEPTNO INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D2 ON D1.PART = D2.DEPTNO

SELECT S.* , D3.DNAME AS DNAME1, D1.DNAME AS DNAME2, D2.DNAME AS DNAME3, P.NAME AS PNAME FROM STU S LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D2 ON S.DEPTNO2 = D2.DEPTNO LEFT JOIN PROFESSOR P ON S.PROFNO = P.PROFNO INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D1 ON S.DEPTNO1 = D1.DEPTNO INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D3 ON D1.PART = D3.DEPTNO WHERE 1=1
AND S.GRADE = #{grade}
